feed.title: Memedroid
feed.subtitle: Trending memes from memedroid.com (no native feed; scraped from the server-rendered homepage).

entry.title: I can't wait until Toy Story 67
Maybe they should move to Uganda
Sheep stealer is my new favorite.
The hardest decision a European faces every July
So, I just learned what "cookies" is.
Allow me to go cry in my room now
Facebook users have to be another type of species
It's because her pussy is fluorescent pink
Would you like to stay for fentanyl tea & crumpets? One Narcan or two?
*every time a bell rings a European dies of heat stroke*
"We can fix it by dumping money on it"
I need to put a payment plan
The Big Apple has been CORED!
Yeah you know what I mea-
Cargo train breaks the sound barrier
The one kid who always buys things off temu...
Ima name my adopted kid cancer so I can say I beat cancer
Only possible if the position being filled is a Cat Herder
Yarg, hear me out me hearties
let the brown man rape you, you racist!
entry.content: let the brown man rape you, you racist!

entry.title: Dems try really hard not to talk about biden for good reason
Cherish the freedom of thought or ut will be taken away from you
Always good to know the truth
If they can't get 'em in the Womb, there's ALWAYS.....
Sometimes I think I'm missing out.
AI Slop. But becoming the truth
When you're tired of a meme but your friend definitely isn't.
Being an American living in the Philippines who has never been to Poland (or any part of Europe, and have no desire to ever go), I can't vouch for the veracity of this video... but I hope it's true.
entry.content: Being an American living in the Philippines who has never been to Poland (or any part of Europe, and have no desire to ever go), I can't vouch for the veracity of this video... but I hope it's true.

entry.title: Yes it's old, it's a repost, and it'll only work if your wife doesn't give a rat's ass about you.
entry.content: Yes it's old, it's a repost, and it'll only work if your wife doesn't give a rat's ass about you.

entry.title: Ain't no food like fast food in the good ole US of A!
entry.content: Ain't no food like fast food in the good ole US of A!

entry.title: This was the most entertaining part of the World Cup for me
entry.content: This was the most entertaining part of the World Cup for me

entry.title: I've been comment banned for weeks. No response to emails. But bots cand leftists can say whatever the fuck they want.
How can a guy survive on that?
